Package dev.jeka.core.api.testing

  • Method Details

    • getLegacyReportDir

      public Path getLegacyReportDir()

    • getProgressStyle

      public JkTestProcessor.JkProgressStyle getProgressStyle()

    • getLauncherConfigurer

      public JkUnaryOperator<org.junit.platform.launcher.core.LauncherConfig.Builder> getLauncherConfigurer()

    • setLegacyReportDir

      public JkTestProcessor.JkEngineBehavior setLegacyReportDir(Path legacyReportDir)
      Sets the directory where will be generated the legacy standard XML report. If null, no legacy standard XML report will be generated.

    • setProgressDisplayer

      public JkTestProcessor.JkEngineBehavior setProgressDisplayer(JkTestProcessor.JkProgressStyle progressDisplayer)
      Sets the test progress type to display on the console. If null, no progress will be displayed.

    • setLauncherConfigurer

      public JkTestProcessor.JkEngineBehavior setLauncherConfigurer(JkUnaryOperator<org.junit.platform.launcher.core.LauncherConfig.Builder> launcherConfigurer)
      Sets up the Junit-platform native LauncherConfig used to build the Launcher.
      Parameters:
      launcherConfigurer - a function that takes the default LauncherConfig as argument and returns the config to use.
